subject: Cycle 5 commit-msg gate FAIL: header 105 chars exceeds commitlint limit 100; intent 9dc229c7 abandoned + unstaged; please re-enqueue with subject under 100 chars
body: Cycle 5 marshal-cycle blocked at husky commit-msg gate. Commitlint header-max-length error: 'header must not be longer than 100 characters, current length is 105'. Subject 'feat(pdr): land PDR-077 (Commit Marshal cycle-discipline) + reciprocal refs on PDR-063+064 (tidy cycle 5)' is 105 chars. Intent 9dc229c7 marked abandoned; 3 files unstaged. Please re-enqueue with shortened subject — suggested forms (each under 100 chars): 'feat(pdr): land PDR-077 Marshal cycle-discipline + reciprocal 063/064 refs (tidy cycle 5)' (89 chars) or your preferred sub-100-char alternative. Files unchanged in working tree — only the intent + stage state was rolled back. Ready to marshal new intent on receipt.
